web.title: Regex that Will Match a Java Method Declaration - Stack Overflow
web.description: The above regexp can match almost all possible combinations of Java method declarations, even those including generics and arrays are return arguments.

web.title: Java Regular Expressions: A Comprehensive Guide - Medium
web.description: Lookarounds let you assert that a pattern is (or is not) followed or preceded by another pattern, without including it in the final match.

web.title: Java Regular Expressions (Regex) Cheat Sheet - JRebel
web.description: In this blog post, we explore Java regular expressions, including how they're used, best practices, and shortcuts to help you use them.
